assertions.rationale: AddDeveloperSigningCredential() is explicitly removed with comments noting its absence

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures KeyManagement.SigningAlgorithms with EcdsaSha256 (ES256) before RsaSha256 (RS256)
assertions.rationale: SigningAlgorithms array has EcdsaSha256 first, RsaSha256 second

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets KeyManagement.RotationInterval to 90 days and PropagationTime to 14 days
Program.cs configures DataProtectKeys = true for key management
Program.cs configures AddDataProtection() with PersistKeysToFileSystem and SetApplicationName
